title: WAMUL NEDFL Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Posts
description: The West Assam Milk Producers' Cooperative Union Limited (WAMUL) and North East Dairy & Foods Limited (NEDFL) have officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree can apply for the WAMUL NEDFL Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education detail...
